long_description:
------ Created from incident source: INC10463756 ------
[COM]-device-agent pod is not ready [SAO] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes
 TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2t7:node:sao1-qz1-sr2-rk105-s20
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1 = 0.9833
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2t7' and kube_pod_name = 'compute-agent-qx7xx'

Time:             12/02/2025 10:46 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://br-sao.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/240efe0c-22a1-4a84-a5a8-8da4a1aa9a57?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F12517162%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM]-device-agent pod is not ready [SAO]
Description:  Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready device-agent is not ready for the past 10 minutes
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum(kube_pod_sysdig_status_ready{kube_pod_name=~"kube-proxy.*|device-agent.*|compute-agent.*"}) by (kube_pod_name, kube_cluster_name) < 1
Duration: 0 ns
Alert URL:    https://br-sao.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/240efe0c-22a1-4a84-a5a8-8da4a1aa9a57?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D418120
